title: July Fishing in Alaska – Peak Season on the Kenai River! Book Now!
summary: July is prime time for fishing in Alaska , offering the best salmon action of the year on the Kenai and Kasilof Rivers . If you want non-stop fishing , this is the month to visit! With sockeye salmon at peak numbers, silver salmon starting to show up, and trophy trout feeding aggressively , Kenai Fl...
